sentence: 他们购置了一套新房子。
pinyin: Tāmen gòuzhì le yī tào xīn fángzi.

sentence: 医生说他得了急性肠胃炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā dé le jíxìng chángwèiyán.
english: The doctor said he has acute gastroenteritis.

sentence: 点击左上角的选单可以切换页面。
pinyin: Diǎnjī zuǒ shàngjiǎo de xuǎndān kěyǐ qiēhuàn yèmiàn.
english: Click the menu in the top-left corner to switch pages.
The specific rules are detailed in the attachment.

sentence: 各国都希望减少核武的数量。
pinyin: Gèguó dōu xīwàng jiǎnshǎo héwǔ de shùliàng.
english: Every country hopes to reduce the number of nuclear weapons.
